entries.text: Starting to document this properly. Building a digital growth agency from scratch — no clients yet, no playbook, just figuring out the first real steps: who I want to serve, what I can actually deliver, and how to get the first conversation.

Digital Growth Agency — Offering website, Google Business Growth, Local SEO, Social Media Growth, AI Automation, Branding and Design, Content Creation, Reputation Management, Analytics & Reporting, Maintenance, Paid Advertising, Online Commerce.

📈 DAILY PROGRESS REPORT — SAKSHAM BASNET
Date: July 7, 2026

💡 Knowledge I Gained
Learned how websites can become recurring income instead of one-time sales.
Understood the difference between selling a website and selling business growth.
Learned what services a Digital Growth Agency can eventually offer.
Learned the basics of Meta Paid Advertising and how advertising works.
Learned how to use AI as a business strategist instead of just asking it to generate websites.
Understood how agencies create recurring monthly revenue through maintenance, SEO, hosting, and other ongoing services.

🎯 Decisions I Made
I will build a Digital Growth Agency, not just a website business.
I will focus on helping local businesses increase customers and improve their online presence.
I will create service packages instead of simply quoting website prices.
I will continue learning paid advertising because it will become one of my agency's future services.

🛠️ Tasks to Complete
☐ Learn Meta Ads Manager in depth.
☐ Learn Google Ads basics.
☐ Develop a client onboarding process.

🚀 Long-Term Vision
I want to build a company that local businesses trust to grow their business online. Instead of saying "I build websites," I want people to say "If you want your business to grow online, contact Saksham."

📝 Reflection
Today wasn't about learning another technical skill — it was about defining the business I want to build. I now have a clearer direction: create a Digital Growth Agency that combines websites, digital marketing, AI, and automation to help local businesses grow while building recurring monthly revenue. This vision gives me a roadmap for what I need to learn and build over the coming months.
